name: ppt-generator
tagline: ClawHub (85★): 将用户讲稿一键生成乔布斯风极简科技感竖屏HTML演示稿。当用户需要生成PPT、演示文稿、Slides、幻灯片，或要求科技风/极简风/乔布斯风格的演示时触发此技能。输出为单个可直接运行的HTML文件。
verdict: The skill requires a bespoke five-form title taxonomy but illustrates not a single one with a worked example, leaving an agent to guess the format. It also has no fallback if the script or template is missing, and no scope boundaries to stop it firing on generic 'make me a presentation' requests.

highlights.summary: Multi-step flow depends on a user script and bundled reference/template files with zero mention anywhere of what to do if the script is empty, the template is missing, or a step ca
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body; the style is narrow (Jobs-style vertical HTML) but nothing stops it firing on generic 'make me a p
A bespoke, non-obvious title-format taxonomy is required but not one of the five forms is illustrated with a worked example.
